contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: Documented Telegram watchdog runbook + sophia upgrade hazards for cross-agent coordination
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/110
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/329
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/330
  
  Details:
  Hardened the operational knowledge around the newly-live Telegram attention watchdog ahead of the sophia EC2 hardware upgrade being run by a parallel agent session. README of truesight_autopilot gains a Deployment subsection with the full one-time login runbook (my.telegram.org code-delivery gotchas, 4-step setup, session-custody rules, re-auth steps, WATCHDOG_* tuning) plus the env-table entry. CONTEXT_UPDATES carries two cross-agent notes: the three non-git artifacts that must survive any volume change (.env with on-box Telegram keys, Telethon session file, watchdog state), and the blue/green cutover hazard — concurrent Telethon clients on one auth key raise AuthKeyDuplicatedError and permanently invalidate the session, so Telegram services must stop on the old box before an AMI clone boots; recommended AWS DLM for periodic AMIs and keeping AMIs private since they now contain live credentials.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 25.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
